assertions.title: Must-change-password users stay in a password-change corridor

steps.action: Log in as seeded tenant admin `uat.admin@example.com` with `mustChangePassword=true` on the current-code runtime
steps.expected: Login succeeds, response exposes `mustChangePassword=true`, and `/auth/me` still reports corridor state
steps.observed: `POST /api/v1/auth/login` returned 200 with `mustChangePassword=true`; `GET /api/v1/auth/me` with `X-Company-Code: MOCK` returned 200 and the payload still reported `mustChangePassword=true`.

steps.action: Probe a normal protected admin surface before password change
steps.expected: Protected work is blocked until the password is changed
steps.observed: `GET /api/v1/admin/users` returned 403 with controlled payload `{code: AUTH_004, reason: PASSWORD_CHANGE_REQUIRED, mustChangePassword: true}`.

The targeted Maven subset passed (54 tests total) including `AuthControllerIT`, `PasswordServiceTest`, and `TenantRuntimeEnforcementAuthIT`; `AuthControllerIT.must_change_password_user_can_detect_corridor_but_is_blocked_from_admin_surface_until_password_changed` is covered in the passing subset.

tests.result: BUILD SUCCESS; Tests run: 54, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0

assertions.title: Resetting or controlling other users respects tenant and role boundaries

steps.action: Probe representative cross-tenant admin denials and super-admin allows on the current-code runtime
steps.expected: Tenant admin is denied cross-tenant privileged actions while super-admin can perform the same action
steps.observed: Tenant admin `ut.taab.admin2@example.com` in `UTTAAB2` received 403 `AUTH_004` on `POST /api/v1/admin/users/3/force-reset-password` and `PUT /api/v1/admin/users/3/status`; super-admin successfully updated the same user status with 200 and the user was re-enabled afterward.

steps.action: Run the dedicated tenant-authority integration suite
steps.expected: Cross-tenant reset/control matrix and denial evidence are green
steps.observed: `mvn test -Djacoco.skip=true -pl . '-Dtest=AuthTenantAuthorityIT'` failed 3/23 tests. Two failures (`tenant_admin_cross_tenant_privileged_user_actions_are_denied_and_audited`, `admin_cannot_create_tenant_admin_user`) reported `Audit event ACCESS_DENIED not found with expected metadata`, and `control_plane_support_reset_denials_use_uniform_message_for_unknown_and_foreign_tenants` remained red.

tests.result: BUILD FAILURE; Tests run: 23, Failures: 3, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0

issues: Denied tenant-admin boundary cases still fail the audit-evidence assertions in `AuthTenantAuthorityIT`, so this assertion is not validation-clean even though representative runtime denials now return 403.
The support-reset denial regression suite remains red, so reset-boundary behavior does not yet have passing end-to-end validation evidence.

assertions.title: Privileged auth-sensitive user actions are boundary-consistent

steps.action: Check runtime deny/allow behavior for representative privileged actions
steps.expected: Tenant admin gets controlled denials while super-admin retains the allowed path
steps.observed: On the rebuilt runtime, tenant admin cross-tenant force-reset and disable attempts returned 403 `AUTH_004`, while super-admin disable/restore on the same user returned 200.

steps.expected: The full privileged-action matrix passes, including denial audit evidence
steps.observed: `AdminUserSecurityIT` passed inside the 54-test targeted subset, but the dedicated `AuthTenantAuthorityIT` matrix still failed 3/23 tests because denied privileged actions did not emit the expected `ACCESS_DENIED` audit evidence and the support-reset denial contract regression remains red.

tests.passingSubset: `AdminUserSecurityIT` passed as part of the 54-test successful targeted run.
tests.failingMatrix: `AuthTenantAuthorityIT` failed 3/23 tests with missing denial audit metadata and one remaining support-reset contract regression.

issues: Privileged-action denial auditing is still not validation-clean in `AuthTenantAuthorityIT`, so the matrix evidence required by this assertion is incomplete.
A remaining denial-contract regression in the support-reset path keeps the boundary suite red.

assertions.title: Global security/runtime settings are not tenant-admin writable

steps.action: Fetch current global settings as super-admin and replay the same payload as tenant admin and super-admin
steps.expected: Tenant admin is denied mutating global settings while super-admin succeeds
steps.observed: `GET /api/v1/admin/settings` returned 200 for super-admin. Replaying the same payload as tenant admin `ut.taab.admin2@example.com` returned 403 `AUTH_004`; replaying as super-admin returned 200 `Settings updated`.

steps.action: Run admin settings authorization regression suites
steps.observed: The targeted Maven subset passed (54 tests total) and included `AdminSettingsControllerTenantRuntimeContractTest`, `SystemSettingsServiceCorsTest`, and `AdminUserSecurityIT` coverage for the denied tenant-admin settings path.

tests.result: BUILD SUCCESS; Tests run: 54, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0

assertions.title: Auth-sensitive failures return controlled application contracts

steps.action: Probe invalid tenant binding on the runtime login surface
steps.expected: Failure returns a controlled JSON envelope instead of raw servlet/framework output
steps.observed: `POST /api/v1/auth/login` with `companyCode=UTTAAB2` for `uat.sales@example.com` returned 400 JSON with `success=false`, `code=VAL_001`, `reason=User not assigned to company: UTTAAB2`, and a trace id/path payload.
The targeted Maven subset passed (54 tests total) and included `AuthHardeningIT`, `AuthControllerIT`, `CompanyContextFilterPasswordResetBypassTest`, and `OpenApiSnapshotIT`.

tests.result: BUILD SUCCESS; Tests run: 54, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0

frictions.description: Launching the delegated `user-testing-flow-validator` subagent failed immediately with `Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.4-high`.
frictions.resolution: Fell back to direct in-session validation and recorded the newer invalid-model variant in `.factory/library/user-testing.md`.

frictions.description: A plain `docker compose up -d --build app` did not produce a testable current-code runtime because `.env` forced `SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=dev`, the compose database only had `flyway_schema_history_v2`, and production CORS validation rejected the persisted HTTP origins.
frictions.resolution: Restarted the compose app with `SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE='prod,flyway-v2' ERP_CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS='https://app.bigbrightpaints.com' ERP_CORS_ALLOW_TAILSCALE_HTTP_ORIGINS='true' DB_PORT=5433 docker compose up -d app` and documented the setup override in `.factory/library/user-testing.md`.

frictions.description: The current-code runtime returned `503 SYS_004 Failed to dispatch email via SMTP` for the super-admin force-reset probe, so runtime evidence for the allowed reset path could not complete on the live surface.
frictions.resolution: Used the passing runtime disable/enable probe plus `AuthTenantAuthorityIT`/`AdminUserSecurityIT` coverage for the remaining privileged reset matrix evidence.

summary: Validated five tenant-admin-auth-boundaries assertions on the rebuilt current-code runtime plus targeted test suites. `VAL-AUTHZ-001`, `VAL-AUTHZ-003`, and `VAL-SEC-001` passed with matching runtime and regression evidence. `VAL-RESET-002` and `VAL-AUTHZ-002` remain failed because the dedicated `AuthTenantAuthorityIT` matrix still reports missing `ACCESS_DENIED` audit metadata for denied privileged actions and a remaining support-reset denial regression, even though representative runtime 403/200 boundary behavior is now visible.
